title: bidens frondosa var. pallida
intro: Bidens frondosa var. pallida, also known as pale beggar-ticks, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Bidens frondosa var. pallida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and soothe menstrual cramps.
